hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); first=$(echo "$cmd" | awk '{print $1}' | sed 's|.*/||'); case "$first" in ls|find) tool="Glob" ;; cat|head|tail) tool="Read" ;; grep|rg) tool="Grep" ;; sed|awk) tool="Edit" ;; echo) echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '>>?|tee' && tool="Write" || exit 0 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; jq -n --arg f "$first" --arg t "$tool" '{"systemMessage":"⚠ Bash(\($f)) — use the \($t) tool instead","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"TOOL USAGE REMINDER: You ran `\($f)` via Bash. Per absolute project rules, ALWAYS use the dedicated \($t) tool instead of Bash when available. Rewrite this action using \($t)."}}'
docker compose exec -T vite npx vite build --logLevel error 2>&1 | tail -5
